allowed_claims: KT is in internal operational use as a governed evidence, replay, and claim-control system.
KT is available for bounded pilot review of verifier, evidence-pack, and claim-compiler workflows.
Independent external re-audit attestation remains pending.
Commercial claims are bounded by the current claim ceiling.
Adaptive law, capability modules, benchmark work, highway shadow work, and FP0 overlay work may continue in prep or shadow mode without expanding claims.
